name: android-profile
description: Shared Android SDK and AVD profile scripts for Docker-based Android emulator images.

interface.shortDescription: Install Android SDK tools, create AVDs, and start emulator profiles.
interface.longDescription: Bundles portable Android SDK and AVD helper scripts plus a default emulator profile for Docker-based Android emulator images.
defaultPrompt: Create an Android AVD from the default profile.
Run the Docker smoke test for start-avd.sh.
